title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Travelodge Group Ltd
body: "Application number 5134  Applicant Travelodge Hotels Ltd objected to the name used by Travelodge Group Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 16 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Travelodge Group Ltd is changed to 15144404, Ltd. "
